title: DTADD Systematic Review Protocol (amended)
author: Jiménez Rios, Alejandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This document presents the protocol adopted to perform a systematic review for the DTADD project following the checklist provided by PRISMA and guidelines of the PRISMA-P Explanation and Elaboration.
steps_raw: This document presents the protocol adopted to perform a systematic review for the DTADD project following the checklist provided by PRISMA and guidelines of the PRISMA-P Explanation and Elaboration.
